title: Trainee Shipbroker
description:
We are looking for a motivated and ambitious individual to start their career in Sale & Purchase (S&P) shipbroking. This role provides the chance to learn from experienced brokers, gain hands-on exposure to vessel transactions, and develop the foundation for a long-term career in the industry.

Key Responsibility:

  • Keep company systems and databases updated with vessel particulars, market insights, and other essential records.
  • Work closely with shipowners, brokers and external counterparts to maintain clear communication and ensure transactions run smoothly.
  • Provide operational and administrative assistance to the Sale & Purchase (S&P) team, such as preparing, reviewing, and handling documentation.
  • Support the team with follow-up actions after deals are concluded, ensuring payments are processed on time, documentation is accurate, and all contractual commitments are fulfilled.
  • Carry out research on vessels, market activity, and broader industry trends to provide useful information that aids commercial decisions.
  • Play an active role in fostering teamwork by supporting colleagues, exchanging knowledge, and contributing to shared success.
  • Handle additional operational or administrative responsibilities as needed to meet the business’s evolving requirements.

Ideal Candidate:

  • Ambitious, driven, and committed to building a successful career in shipbroking.
  • Strong interpersonal skills, able to build and maintain effective professional relationships.
  • Detail-oriented with excellent accuracy in handling information.
  • Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.
  • Confident communicator with strong verbal and written English skills.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).

postedCompany.description:
Global Maritime Talent Experts

Angle Recruitment is a global company that specialises in maritime recruitment and executive search. With our extensive industry expertise and commitment to excellence, we combine traditional values with state-of-the-art technology to deliver exceptional recruitment solutions. Our goal is to establish ourselves as the trusted partner for maritime professionals and organisations seeking top-tier talent. Headquartered in Singapore, one of the world's largest shipping and commodity trading hubs, Angle Recruitment is strategically positioned to serve the global maritime community.


EA Licence: 23S1597
